scripts.dev:api: pnpm run env:sync && cd deploy && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build --no-deps omnirouter
scripts.dev:api:allinone: pnpm run env:sync && cd deploy && docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up --build omnirouter
scripts.dev:api:source: pnpm run env:sync && make -C backend dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run env:sync && pnpm --dir frontend dev
